name: Thinking
goal: Show that an LLM is reasoning before the first token arrives, with an animated indicator and a screen-reader-friendly label.
description: Compact typing indicator with three animation variants (dots, wave, spinner) and a configurable label. The host element is role=status with aria-live=polite so assistive tech announces appearance and disappearance.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible + spoken label. Slotted content overrides this.

slots.description: Optional override for the label text.

sideEffects.description: Sets role=status and aria-live=polite on the host element when missing.
sideEffects.reason: Standard live-region semantics so SR users hear the state change.

a11y.notes: aria-live=polite so screen readers announce state changes; provide a meaningful label.
